steps.title: Connect threat to priority
steps.content: Text 1 says northern wild rice faces significantly worse climate outcomes, while white-tailed deer should withstand the predicted warming and likely will not need the same conservation efforts. Text 2 says agencies should prioritize the species most threatened.

steps.title: Remove unsupported options
steps.content: A calls for immediate programs for both species, which ignores the different threat levels. C shifts to preventing temperature increases, a topic neither text addresses. D adds a claim about combining agency resources with tribal knowledge that the texts do not make. The answer is B.
